reviews.comment:
De todas las veces que fui a cargar nafta no pude pagar con mercado pago / codigo qr porque no tienen ese medio de pago, y era un lio para sacar la billetrra del baul d la moto, me tuve que bajar, esperar  a que me cobrara , firmarle y dsp guardar todo para volver a subirme e irme del lugar

(Translated by Google)
Every time I went to fill up with gas, I couldn't pay with Mercado Pago/QR code because they don't have that payment method, and it was a hassle to get my wallet out of the motorcycle's trunk. I had to get off, wait for them to charge me, sign, and then put everything away to get back on and leave.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJX2REQ1h3EAE
